reference: Okay, I am seventeen years old and I have this nerve issue going on in my legs. I cannot feel them very well. If I take a sharp tool or something, I can feel it, but not as much as I should be able to feel it. It should hurt, but I only feel a dull, soft pinch on my leg. Is this a blood clot or something? I would like to know if it is serious.
text: Okay. I am 17 years old, and I have this nerve issue going on in my legs. I cannot feel them very well. If I take a sharp tool or something, I can feel it, but not as much as I should be able to feel it. It should hurt, but I— Dull, soft pinch on my leg. Is this a blood clot or something? I would like to know if it is serious.
